files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@
+~$
+.swp$
+build/
+bin/
+lib/
+msg_gen/
+srv_gen/
+msg/.*Action\.msg$
+msg/.*ActionFeedback\.msg$
+msg/.*ActionGoal\.msg$
+msg/.*ActionResult\.msg$
+msg/.*Feedback\.msg$
+msg/.*Goal\.msg$
+msg/.*Result\.msg$
+msg/_.*\.py$
+
+\.pcd$
+.pyc$
+
+# Generated by dynamic reconfigure
+\.cfgc$
+/cfg/cpp/
+/cfg/.*\.py$
+
+# Ignore generated docs
+.dox$
+.wikidoc$
+
+# eclipse stuff
+.project
+.cproject
+
+# qcreator stuff
+CMakeLists.txt.user
+
+srv/_.*\.py$
+\.pcd$
+.pyc$
+qtcreator-*
+*.user
+
+/planning/cfg
+/planning/docs
+/planning/src
+
+*~$
+
+# Emacs
+.#*
+
+# Catkin custom files
+CATKIN_IGNORE

-        <rr_wheel pos="0 -1" mass="6.0" width="0.30" diameter="0.62">

         </rr_wheel>
         
         <!-- Front wheels -->

-file(GLOB VehicleDynamics_SRCS

-file(GLOB WorldElements_SRCS

 INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES(".")
 
 # Declare the target (a library)
-ADD_LIBRARY(mvsim STATIC 
-	${ROOT_SRCS}

 source_group(General FILES ${ROOT_SRCS})

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<launch>
+
+	<arg name="world_file" default="$(find mvsim)/mvsim_tutorial/mvsim_slam.xml" />
+
+	<node pkg="mvsim" type="mvsim_node" name="mvsim_simulator" output="screen">
+		<param name="world_file" value="$(arg world_file)"/>    
+	</node>
+
+	<node pkg="rviz" type="rviz" name="rviz" args="-d $(find mvsim)/mvsim_tutorial/mvsim_slam.rviz"/>
+  <!--PARAMETERS-->
+    <param name="ini_filename" value="$(find mrpt_rbpf_slam)/tutorial/grid_slam_demo.ini"/>
+    <param name="odom_frame_id" value="/odom"/>
+    <param name="global_frame_id" value="/map"/>
+    <param name="base_frame_id" value="/base_link"/>
+    <param name="sensor_source" value="scan"/> <!--for multiple sensors, place comma eg "r1/front_laser/scan,/beacon" -->
+    
+
+
+
+  
+
+  <node pkg="mrpt_rbpf_slam" type="mrpt_rbpf_slam" name="mrpt_rbpf_slam" output="screen"></node>
+  
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,212 @@
+Panels:
+  - Class: rviz/Displays
+    Help Height: 0
+    Name: Displays
+    Property Tree Widget:
+      Expanded:
+        - /Global Options1
+        - /Status1
+        - /Grid1
+        - /Map1
+        - /TF1
+        - /TF1/Tree1
+        - /LaserScan1
+        - /MarkerArray1
+        - /MarkerArray1/Namespaces1
+        - /PoseArray1
+      Splitter Ratio: 0.833992
+    Tree Height: 296
+  - Class: rviz/Selection
+    Name: Selection
+  - Class: rviz/Tool Properties
+    Expanded:
+      - /2D Pose Estimate1
+      - /2D Nav Goal1
+      - /Publish Point1
+    Name: Tool Properties
+    Splitter Ratio: 0.588679
+  - Class: rviz/Views
+    Expanded:
+      - /Current View1
+    Name: Views
+    Splitter Ratio: 0.5
+  - Class: rviz/Time
+    Experimental: false
+    Name: Time
+    SyncMode: 0
+    SyncSource: ""
+  - Class: rviz_plugin_tutorials/Teleop
+    Name: Teleop
+    Topic: /cmd_vel
+  - Class: rviz_plugin_tutorials/Teleop
+    Name: Teleop
+    Topic: /r2/cmd_vel
+Visualization Manager:
+  Class: ""
+  Displays:
+    - Alpha: 0.5
+      Cell Size: 1
+      Class: rviz/Grid
+      Color: 160; 160; 164
+      Enabled: true
+      Line Style:
+        Line Width: 0.03
+        Value: Lines
+      Name: Grid
+      Normal Cell Count: 0
+      Offset:
+        X: 0
+        Y: 0
+        Z: 0
+      Plane: XY
+      Plane Cell Count: 80
+      Reference Frame: <Fixed Frame>
+      Value: true
+    - Alpha: 0.7
+      Class: rviz/Map
+      Color Scheme: map
+      Draw Behind: false
+      Enabled: true
+      Name: Map
+      Topic: /map
+      Value: true
+    - Class: rviz/TF
+      Enabled: true
+      Frame Timeout: 15
+      Frames:
+        All Enabled: false
+        base_footprint:
+          Value: true
+        base_link:
+          Value: true
+        map:
+          Value: true
+        odom:
+          Value: true
+        scan:
+          Value: true
+        world:
+          Value: true
+      Marker Scale: 4
+      Name: TF
+      Show Arrows: false
+      Show Axes: true
+      Show Names: true
+      Tree:
+        world:
+          map:
+            odom:
+              base_link:
+                base_footprint:
+                  {}
+                scan:
+                  {}
+      Update Interval: 0
+      Value: true
+    - Alpha: 1
+      Autocompute Intensity Bounds: true
+      Autocompute Value Bounds:
+        Max Value: 10
+        Min Value: -10
+        Value: true
+      Axis: Z
+      Channel Name: z
+      Class: rviz/LaserScan
+      Color: 255; 255; 255
+      Color Transformer: Intensity
+      Decay Time: 0
+      Enabled: true
+      Invert Rainbow: false
+      Max Color: 255; 255; 255
+      Max Intensity: 0
+      Min Color: 0; 0; 0
+      Min Intensity: 0
+      Name: LaserScan
+      Position Transformer: XYZ
+      Queue Size: 10
+      Selectable: true
+      Size (Pixels): 3
+      Size (m): 0.1
+      Style: Flat Squares
+      Topic: /laser1
+      Use Fixed Frame: true
+      Use rainbow: true
+      Value: true
+    - Class: rviz/MarkerArray
+      Enabled: true
+      Marker Topic: /chassis_markers
+      Name: MarkerArray
+      Namespaces:
+        mvsim.chassis_shape: true
+        mvsim.chassis_shape.wheel0: true
+        mvsim.chassis_shape.wheel1: true
+      Queue Size: 100
+      Value: true
+    - Arrow Length: 0.5
+      Class: rviz/PoseArray
+      Color: 255; 25; 0
+      Enabled: true
+      Name: PoseArray
+      Topic: /particlecloud
+      Value: true
+  Enabled: true
+  Global Options:
+    Background Color: 48; 48; 48
+    Fixed Frame: map
+    Frame Rate: 30
+  Name: root
+  Tools:
+    - Class: rviz/Interact
+      Hide Inactive Objects: true
+    - Class: rviz/MoveCamera
+    - Class: rviz/Select
+    - Class: rviz/FocusCamera
+    - Class: rviz/Measure
+    - Class: rviz/SetInitialPose
+      Topic: /initialpose
+    - Class: rviz/SetGoal
+      Topic: /move_base_simple/goal
+    - Class: rviz/PublishPoint
+      Single click: true
+      Topic: /clicked_point
+  Value: true
+  Views:
+    Current:
+      Class: rviz/Orbit
+      Distance: 16.2567
+      Enable Stereo Rendering:
+        Stereo Eye Separation: 0.06
+        Stereo Focal Distance: 1
+        Swap Stereo Eyes: false
+        Value: false
+      Focal Point:
+        X: 8.82567
+        Y: -7.6953
+        Z: 6.91909
+      Name: Current View
+      Near Clip Distance: 0.01
+      Pitch: 1.3248
+      Target Frame: <Fixed Frame>
+      Value: Orbit (rviz)
+      Yaw: 4.6804
+    Saved: ~
+Window Geometry:
+  Displays:
+    collapsed: false
+  Height: 639
+  Hide Left Dock: false
+  Hide Right Dock: true
+  QMainWindow State: 
+  Selection:
+    collapsed: false
+  Teleop:
+    collapsed: false
+  Time:
+    collapsed: false
+  Tool Properties:
+    collapsed: false
+  Views:
+    collapsed: true
+  Width: 1301
+  X: 65
+  Y: 24

@@ -0,0 +1,89 @@
+<mvsim_world version="1.0">
+	<!-- General simulation options -->
+	<simul_timestep>0.010</simul_timestep> <!-- Simulation fixed-time interval for numerical integration -->
+	<b2d_vel_iters>3</b2d_vel_iters>
+	<b2d_pos_iters>3</b2d_pos_iters>
+	
+	<!-- GUI options -->
+	<gui>
+		<ortho>false</ortho>
+		<show_forces>true</show_forces>  <force_scale>0.01</force_scale>
+		<cam_distance>35</cam_distance>
+		<fov_deg>35</fov_deg>
+		<!-- <follow_vehicle>r1</follow_vehicle> -->
+	</gui>
+
+	
+	<!-- ========================
+		   Scenario definition
+	     ======================== -->
+	<element class="occupancy_grid">
+		<!-- File can be an image or an MRPT .gridmap file -->
+		<file>mvsim_demo_world1.png</file>
+		
+		<!-- The rest of params are ignored if file is an MRPT gridmap -->
+		<resolution>0.25</resolution>
+		
+		<!--<show_collisions>true</show_collisions>-->
+	</element>
+		
+	<!-- ground grid (for visual reference) -->
+	<element class="ground_grid">
+		<!--<floating>true</floating>-->
+	</element>
+	
+	<!-- =============================
+		   Vehicle classes definition 
+	     ============================= -->
+	<vehicle:class name="small_robot">
+		
+		<!--  Dynamical model -->
+		<dynamics class="differential">
+			<!-- Params -->
+			<l_wheel pos="0.0  0.5" mass="4.0" width="0.20" diameter="0.40" />
+			<r_wheel pos="0.0 -0.5" mass="4.0" width="0.20" diameter="0.40" />
+			<chassis mass="15.0" zmin="0.05" zmax="0.6">
+			</chassis>
+			
+			<!--   Motor controller -->
+			<controller class="twist_pid">
+				<!-- Params -->
+				<KP>100</KP>  <KI>5</KI> <I_MAX>10</I_MAX> <KD>0</KD>
+				<V>0.0</V><W>0</W>
+				<max_torque>25</max_torque>
+			</controller>
+			
+		</dynamics>
+				
+		<!-- Friction force simulation -->
+		<friction class="default">
+			<mu>0.7</mu>
+			<C_damping>0.4</C_damping>
+		</friction>
+				
+		<!-- Sensors: -->
+		<sensor class="laser" name="scan">
+			<pose> 0.60  0.0  0.0 </pose>
+			<fov_degrees>180</fov_degrees>
+			<nrays>181</nrays>
+			<range_std_noise>0.01</range_std_noise>
+			<angle_std_noise_deg>0.01</angle_std_noise_deg>
+		</sensor>
+	</vehicle:class>
+	
+	
+	
+	<!-- ========================
+		   Vehicle(s) definition 
+	     ======================== -->
+	<vehicle name="r1" class="small_robot">
+		<init_pose>0 0 0</init_pose>  <!-- In global coords: x,y, yaw(deg) -->
+		<init_vel>0 0 0</init_vel>  <!-- In local coords: vx,vy, omega(deg/s) -->
+	</vehicle>
+
+	
+
+
+		
+	
+</mvsim_world>
